evals.prompt: 用这个 servicePinId 发起远程任务，然后持续 watch 到完成并给我最终结果。
evals.expected_output: Uses services call plus trace watch/get completion handling and returns remote result text verbatim.

evals.prompt: trace 超时了，帮我继续跟进并打开 trace 页面，我要看细节。
evals.expected_output: Treats timeout as follow-up signal, runs trace get/watch appropriately, and recommends ui open --page trace.

evals.prompt: 我只想发一条私信给对方，不下单服务。
evals.expected_output: Should NOT keep call-remote as primary. Should hand off to metabot-chat-privatechat.
